summary: Comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ auth page restructure with new auth hierarchy (Google > Apple > Email > Password) and Apple Sign In backend infrastructure. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 16 frontend UI tests passed (100%).

auth_page_button_order_mobile.detail: Button Y positions verified: Google (342) > Apple (406) > Email (522) > Password (584)

auth_page_button_order_desktop.detail: Button Y positions verified: Google (322) > Apple (386) > Email (502) > Password (564)

google_button_styling.detail: Google button has white background (rgb(255, 255, 255)) - primary style

apple_button_styling.detail: Apple button has black background (rgb(0, 0, 0)) - Apple standard style

apple_button_text.detail: Apple button says 'Sign in with Apple'

email_button_text.detail: Email button says 'Continue with Email' below 'or' divider

password_link_text.detail: 'Sign in with password instead' link at bottom

apple_button_toast.detail: Apple button click shows toast 'Apple Sign In is not yet available'

email_entry_step.detail: Clicking 'Continue with Email' shows email input + 'Send Verification Code' button

email_otp_flow.detail: Email OTP flow works: enter email → send code → OTP input fields appear with 'Verify & Sign In' button

back_button_navigation.detail: Back button on email-entry step returns to main auth step

password_form_display.detail: Clicking password link shows email+password form with 'Sign In' button

desktop_split_layout.detail: Desktop view (1920x800) shows split layout with left image panel (luxury Indian wedding palace)

critical_code_review_comments: AuthPage.js correctly implements new auth hierarchy: Google (primary) > Apple > Email > Password (tertiary)
Apple button has correct black styling per Apple Human Interface Guidelines
Google button has correct white/bright styling as primary CTA
apple_auth.py properly returns 503 when APPLE_CLIENT_ID/TEAM_ID/KEY_ID/PRIVATE_KEY not set
AppleAuthCallback.js properly handles OAuth callback with code exchange
Both Apple and Google OAuth infrastructure is complete but disabled (no credentials injected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth page restructure fully tested with new hierarchy: Google (primary, white) > Apple (black) > Email (below 'or' divider) > Password (link at bottom). Apple Sign In infrastructure is complete but disabled (returns enabled:false and 503 on auth-url/callback). Google OAuth also disabled. Email OTP flow works. Password login works with democustomer@venulock.in / password123. Desktop shows split layout with left image panel. All features working correctly.
